ScanRecord.title: Forensic Scan Record
ScanRecord.description: Represents a completed forensic analysis scan for content authenticity verification.

id.description: The unique ID of the scan

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner

fileType.description: Type of media, e.g., image, audio, or text

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes

is_synthetic_probability.description: Calculated probability of the content being AI-generated or synthetic, from 0.0 to 1.0

primary_classification.description: Overall integrity check classification: Authentic, Suspected AI-Generated, or Jailbreak Attempt

detected_artifacts.description: Array of strings describing suspected anomaly markers or deepfake details

visual_bounding_boxes.description: JSON serializable array of detected anomalies with x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max and label

audio_anomalies.description: JSON serializable array of audio time ranges with start_time, end_time, reason

content_analysis.description: Detailed notes or analysis summary for the content (or highlighted text sentences)

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this scan was conducted

UserPreference.title: User Configurations
UserPreference.description: Preferences and risk assessment levels set by the security operator.

userId.description: The Firebase UID of the user

analysisSensitivity.description: Required scan strictness: high, medium, low

/scans/{scanId}.description: A collection of individual forensic verification results.

/preferences/{userId}.description: A collection of user custom sensitivity controls.
